steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize similarity between the two materials. Both undergo torsional heating when twisted, even though their temperature increases differ (3.5°C vs 21.3°C). The correct answer treats them as sharing the same behavior.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Mentions both materials but does not establish that they share the same behavior. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Both [materials] heat up when twisted': 'Both' directly signals similarity, and a single shared behavior is stated. ✓
  • Choice C: Explicitly contrasts their different temperature changes — emphasizes difference, not similarity. ✗
  • Choice D: Generalizes about torsional heating without focusing on the two specific materials. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
